ValidationRule.description: Prevents stage regression for non-System Administrator users by comparing the current and prior stage sequence.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', CASE(Stage__c , "Prospecting",1, "Needs Analysis",2, "Credit Check",3, "Contract Sent",4, "Negotiation",5, "Sent to Backoffice",6, "Opportunity Won",7, "Opportunity Lost",9, "Bid Won",10, "Bid Won",11, 99) < CASE(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c), "Prospecting",1, "Needs Analysis",2, "Credit Check",3, "Contract Sent",4, "Negotiation",5, "Sent to Backoffice",6, "Opportunity Won",7, "Opportunity Lost",9, "Bid Won",10, "Bid Won",11, 0) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not move to a prior stage. Please contact your system administrator to make this change for you. Thank you
